candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is an R&D-related amortization row, not COGS/cost of sales D&A. The selected COGS bucket is 'Cost of Sales', and no separate COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is visible above the financial section.

variables.notes: No separate COGS-related D&A row is visible in the operating section. The only explicit D&A row shown belongs to R&D, so nothing should be added separately to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This appears to be a sub-component of the selected parent row 'Research and development expenses', not a separate same-level SG&A/R&D D&A line. Because 'Research and development expenses' is already included in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding this R&D amortization separately would risk distortion/double counting under the XSGA-XRD interaction rule.

variables.notes: The explicit amortization row is nested within R&D and is already embedded in the selected 'Research and development expenses' bucket. Since that same R&D row is also the selected XRD row, no separate XSGA_DA addition should be made.
